# Syahdan Hayyan Alawy - Robotics & AI Engineering Portfolio

> Welcome to the official portfolio of Syahdan Hayyan Alawy (adan). I build things at the intersection of hardware and software — from autonomous robots to AI-powered dashboards.

## About Me
- **Role**: Robotics & AI Engineering Student @ Universitas Airlangga (UNAIR)
- **Skills**: Python, C/C++, HTML/CSS/JS, ROS / ROS 2, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, IoT (ESP32), Gazebo Sim.
- **Background**: Passionate about embedded systems, machine learning, and automation. Currently looking for new challenges in robotics and AI.

## My Projects & Systems

### TEEP Scholarship Portal
- **Link**: https://teep.bica.ca
- **Description**: Platform for finding TEEP (Taiwan Experience Education Program) scholarships and university programs.

### AIPrep Learning System
- **Link**: https://aiprep.bica.ca
- **Description**: AI-powered study platform generating summaries, podcasts, flashcards, and interactive modules from raw context.

### Scraptor
- **Link**: https://scraptor.bica.ca
- **Description**: Meso-scale Data Scraper Service.

### Solar Panel Tracker
- **Link**: https://spanel.bica.ca
- **Description**: ESP32 embedded firmware with MQTT communication for real-time monitoring of solar panel orientation and weather sensor data.

### ESP32-Cam Stream
- **Link**: https://cam.bica.ca
- **Description**: Multi-user streaming platform with secure API key authentication and real-time video streaming.

### Pallet AMR Simulator
- **Description**: Simulation of a pallet autonomous mobile robot with dual fork-lift in ROS 2 and Gazebo, including Nav2 navigation stack.

### Loan Default Prediction
- **Description**: Built a prediction model using CatBoost + SHAP. Used SHAP to highlight main risk drivers like loan-to-income ratio and interest rate.

### A* Pathfinder
- **Link**: https://astar.bica.ca
- **Description**: Interactive map simulation using the A* algorithm for finding the shortest delivery route between cities in East Java.
